backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a cigarette shop inventory system with products map and sales list, exposing functions to add stock, record sales, query today's sales, and reset stocks.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping each product feature (dashboard, add stock, record sale, inventory view, etc.) to their implementing source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each page, component, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar color roles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point setting viewport meta, the 'Shop Inventory Manager' page title, and mounting the React app via the #root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining a root layout with Header/Outlet and six child routes (dashboard, add-stock, record-sale, view-inventory, daily-sales-report, reset-inventory) mapped to their page components.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header that shows a ShoppingBag logo and 'POS Manager' subtitle on the home route, or a back-arrow button navigating to '/' on all sub-pages.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Full-page layout wrapper composing the Header, a centered max-w-lg main content area, and a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/PasswordGate.tsx: Reusable password prompt component that validates input against the hardcoded string 'gulserxan', with show/hide toggle and inline error feedback before calling onSuccess.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an authenticated identity when available or falling back to anonymous, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for interacting with the canister actor: adding stock, recording sales, fetching today's sales, and resetting stocks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and reusable button/card utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AddStock.tsx: Multi-step form page (product → quantity → price → success) for adding inventory stock, using the useAddStock mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/DailySalesReport.tsx: Page displaying today's sales report with total revenue and units sold summary cards plus a per-product breakdown, fetched via useTodaySales and gated behind a PasswordGate component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Home dashboard page rendering a list of navigation action buttons (Add Stock, Record Sale, View Inventory, Daily Sales Report, Reset Inventory) with styled variants.
frontend/src/pages/RecordSale.tsx: Multi-step form page for recording a sale: guides the user through selecting a product, quantity, and price, then submits via the useRecordSale mutation and shows a success or error state.
frontend/src/pages/ResetInventory.tsx: Password-gated admin page that resets all product stock quantities to zero, requiring a two-step confirmation before calling the useResetStocks mutation.
frontend/src/pages/ViewInventory.tsx: Password-gated inventory page that lists all predefined products with today's sold quantities fetched via getTodaySales; notes that live stock quantities are unavailable due to a missing backend endpoint.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a mobile-first design system with custom OKLCH color tokens, typography/display fonts, border radii, box shadows, and fade-in/accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the mobile-first shop POS app's architecture, predefined cigarette products, password ('gulserxan'), known issues, and the list of already-implemented features.
